name: English

site.title: Log&Play
site.headline: A free and controlled ecosystem to create, analyze and publish tomorrow’s music.
site.intro: Log&Play brings together web, music and knowledge tools around one idea: helping creators compose, understand, organize and share without losing control of their data or artistic choices.

ui.footerNotice: Public links will be enabled progressively. No administration service is exposed from this page.
ui.asideNotice: Public links enabled after visual validation, Linux preproduction and Cloudflare configuration.

projects.title: OPUS
projects.subtitle: Free framework
projects.description: OPUS is the free web foundation of the Log&Play ecosystem: page rendering, modular architecture, public routes, living documentation and clean generated sites.

projects.title: MAESTRO
projects.subtitle: Music assistant
projects.description: MAESTRO targets a music environment for REAPER: project analysis, composition workflow, orchestration, MIDI preparation and guidance for musician decisions.

projects.title: Knowledge Engine
projects.subtitle: Private knowledge engine
projects.description: The KB is Log&Play’s private music knowledge engine: corpora, references, analyses, workers and user-controlled learning pipelines.

principles: Free software when it should be free.
Private data when it must remain private.
Tools made to create music, not maintain infrastructure.

footer.baseline: Log&Play · music creation, free tools and controlled knowledge.
